name: native-select
title: Native Select
description: A styled native <select> with a Chevron indicator. Same field chrome as Input. Use when a custom dropdown is unnecessary.

meta.usage: Use for simple option lists where the native select UX is acceptable — particularly on mobile, where native pickers have better ergonomics. Pair with Label via htmlFor/id. For searchable or complex option lists, use the Combobox or Select component instead.
never: Never hardcode the chevron colour; it derives from --layout-muted-fg
Never attempt to style the option elements — they are rendered by the OS
Never use for more than ~15 options without a search; switch to Combobox
Never remove appearance-none — it hides the OS chevron so the custom one shows
